title: Boot/Kernel Configuration Modified
expression: contains(to_string(event.category), 'file') && contains(to_string(event.type), 'change') && (contains(to_string(file.path), '/etc/sysctl') || contains(to_string(file.path), '/etc/modules-load.d/') || contains(to_string(file.path), '/etc/modprobe.d/') || contains(to_string(file.path), '/etc/default/grub') || contains(to_string(file.path), '/lib/modules/'))
